question: Platform as a Service (PaaS)
canonical_answer:
✔Provides platform to the users to develop and deploy an application on the development platform provided by the service provider
✔In traditional application development, the application will be developed locally and will be hosted in a central location
✔This changes the application development from local machine to online
✔Google AppEngine, Windows Azure
